zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Guncelin Badlesmere於1243年之前出生在英國肯特時，他的父親Bartholomew de Badlesmere27歲，母親Margaret de Clare35歲。他於大約1274年與Joan FitzBernard在英國肯特巴德萊斯莫結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1297年被列為commander of array, kent and going overseas for the king。他去世於1301年4月13日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國肯特巴德萊斯莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Guncelin Badlesmere于1243年之前出生在英国肯特时，他的父亲Bartholomew de Badlesmere27岁，母亲Margaret de Clare35岁。他于大约1274年与Joan FitzBernard在英国肯特巴德萊斯莫结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1297年被列为commander of array, kent and going overseas for the king。他去世于1301年4月13日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国肯特巴德萊斯莫。

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Guncelin Badlesmere was born before 1243, in Kent, England, his father, Bartholomew de Badlesmere, was 27 and his mother, Margaret de Clare, was 35. He married Joan FitzBernard about 1274, in Badlesmere, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1297, his occupation is listed as commander of array, kent and going overseas for the king. He died before 13 April 1301, in his hometown, and was buried in Badlesmere, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Guncelin Badlesmere est né avant 1243, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Bartholomew de Badlesmere, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Clare, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Joan FitzBernard environ 1274, à Badlesmere, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1297, sa profession de son indiquée est commander of array, kent and going overseas for the king. Il est décédé avant 13 avril 1301, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Badlesmere, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Guncelin Badlesmere vor 1243 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bartholomew de Badlesmere 27 und seine Mutter Margaret de Clare 35. Er hat um 1274 in Badlesmere, Kent, England Joan FitzBernard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1297 ist sein Beruf als commander of array, kent and going overseas for the king aufgeführt. Er starb vor 13. April 1301 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Badlesmere, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Guncelin Badlesmere è nato il prima del 1243 nel Kent, England, il suo padre, Bartholomew de Badlesmere, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Clare, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Joan FitzBernard circa 1274, nel Badlesmere, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1297, la sua occupazione è indicata come commander of array, kent and going overseas for the king. Morì prima del 13 aprile 1301, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Badlesmere, Kent, England.

ja.Badlesmere, Kent, England: イギリスケントバドレスメア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Guncelin Badlesmereが1243年以前にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Bartholomew de Badlesmereは27歳，母Margaret de Clareは35歳であった。約1274年にイギリスケントバドレスメアでJoan FitzBernardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1297年，職業はcommander of array, kent and going overseas for the kingと記録されている。彼は1301年4月13日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスケントバドレスメアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Guncelin Badlesmere(이)가 1243년 이전 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bartholomew de Badlesmere(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Clare(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1274년 영국 켄트 바들레스머에서 Joan FitzBernard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1297년, 그의 직업은 commander of array, kent and going overseas for the king이었다. 그는 1301년 4월 13일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 켄트 바들레스머에 묻혔다.

mn.before 1243–before 13 April 1301: 1243 оноос өмнө–1301 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 13–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Guncelin Badlesmere nasceu antes 1243, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bartholomew de Badlesmere, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Clare, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan FitzBernard aproximadamente 1274, em Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1297, sua profissão aparece como commander of array, kent and going overseas for the king. Ele faleceu antes 13 de abril de 1301, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Guncelin Badlesmere родился перед 1243 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Bartholomew de Badlesmere было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Clare, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan FitzBernard около 1274 г. в местности бадлесмир, кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1297 году он работал по профессии commander of array, kent and going overseas for the king. Он умер перед 13 апрель 1301 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности бадлесмир, кэнт, Англия.

sm.before 1243–before 13 April 1301: a'e le'I oo le 1243–a'e le'I oo le 13 Aperila 1301

es.before 1243–before 13 April 1301: antes de 1243–antes de 13 de abril de 1301
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Guncelin Badlesmere nació antes de 1243, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Bartholomew de Badlesmere, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margaret de Clare, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Joan FitzBernard aproximadamente 1274, en Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1297, su ocupación registrada era commander of array, kent and going overseas for the king. Murió antes de 13 de abril de 1301, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra.
